tagline: Baza ikibazo icyo ari cyo cyose ku buzima bwawe — mu ibanga kandi nta gucirwaho iteka.
consent_title: Murakaza neza — reka dutegure ahantu hatekanye
consent_body: Aha ni ahantu h'ibanga kandi h'ibanga rikomeye ho kwiga ku buzima bw'imyororokere n'imibonano mpuzabitsina. Ntidukubaza izina ryawe kandi ntitubika uwo uri we. Ushobora guhagarara igihe cyose ushaka.
consent_anonymous_confirm: Numva ko ibibazo byanjye bidasangirwa n'undi (ni ibanga)
chat_fallback_message: Ntabwo nshobora gufasha muri icyo kibazo. Nyamuneka vugana n'umujyanama w'ubuzima wizewe.
offline_banner: Serivisi ntiraboneka by'agateganyo. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze nyuma.
landing_title: Ibisubizo nyakuri ku mubiri wawe, ubuzima bwawe, n'ibyo uhitamo.
landing_who: Ku rubyiruko n'abantu bafite ubumuga mu Rwanda — mu Kinyarwanda cyangwa Icyongereza.
landing_learn_more: Uko bikora, indimi, ubushobozi bwo kugera n'umutekano
landing_lang_body: Hindura hagati y'Ikinyarwanda n'Icyongereza igihe cyose ukoresheje buto y'ururimi iri hejuru y'urupapuro.
landing_help_2: Kwirinda gutwita no gusobanukirwa uburyo bwo kuboneza urubyaro
landing_help_3: Virusi itera SIDA n'izindi ndwara zandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina
landing_help_5: Aho wabona ubufasha nyakuri hafi yawe
landing_how_1: Kanda "Tangira ikiganiro" wemeze ko ufite imyaka 13 cyangwa irenga kandi ko ikiganiro cyawe ari ibanga.
landing_how_2: Andika ikibazo cyawe — cyangwa ukande kimwe mu bibazo byateguwe niba kwandika bigoye.
landing_how_3: Hindura hagati y'Ikinyarwanda n'Icyongereza igihe cyose ukoresheje buto y'ururimi.
landing_how_4: Fungura igenamiterere ry'ubushobozi bwo kugera kugira ngo unini inyandiko, ukoreshe amabara atandukanye cyane, cyangwa umve ibisubizo bisomwa mu ijwi.
landing_access_title: Yubatswe kugira ngo ikoreshwe na bose
